# Business Model

Business OS is modular SaaS.

Customers subscribe only to the Assistants they need.

Every Assistant must be independently valuable and integrate with Shared Core.

## Packaging Principle

Assistants should feel like focused products, not ERP modules.

Customers should not be forced into unnecessary complexity or bundled workflows
that do not match their business.

## Platform Principle

Shared platform capabilities should reduce engineering duplication and improve
the customer experience without creating a monolith.

## Trust Principle

The business model depends on trust. Business OS should grow because it reduces
stress, saves time, and helps owners operate with confidence.
